meta.intent: Put the ice-route read under fair water pressure by making the lower puppy urgent but not hidden.
meta.expectedPath: Prioritize the lower puppy, break the key ice before the lane is fully urgent, stabilize dock once, then pivot upward.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player waits for the route to look urgent before breaking ice and loses too much action tempo to water.
meta.whatItProves: Water can sharpen the future-value ice decision without turning the level into a timer.
meta.notes: Role: pressure. Initial flood and water interval create urgency, but the iced lower lane is visible from the opening board.
